title: post register user with valid data
description: Test the user registration endpoint by submitting valid name, email, and password data and verify successful account creation.

title: post register user with invalid data
description: Test the user registration endpoint by submitting invalid or incomplete registration data and verify appropriate validation error messages are returned.

title: post login user with correct credentials
description: Test the user login endpoint by submitting valid email and password and verify successful authentication and access to the user dashboard.

title: post login user with incorrect credentials
description: Test the user login endpoint by submitting invalid email or password and verify that an invalid credentials error message is returned.

title: post book parking slot with valid vehicle number
description: Test booking a specific parking slot by submitting a valid vehicle number and confirm the booking is successful and reflected in the user bookings.

title: post exit active booking and view receipt
description: Test ending an active booking by submitting the booking ID to the exit endpoint and verify the booking is ended and the receipt details are correctly displayed.

title: post update user profile settings
description: Test updating user profile information such as name, email, and notification preferences and verify the changes are saved and reflected in the user settings.

title: post change user password with valid data
description: Test changing the user password by submitting current password, new password, and confirmation and verify the password is updated successfully.

title: post admin add new parking slot
description: Test the admin endpoint to add a new parking slot and verify the slot appears in the slot list and is available for booking.

title: post admin toggle parking slot status
description: Test toggling the status of a parking slot via the admin endpoint and verify the slot status changes accordingly in the system.
